description: Click/press to trigger an action; success via state/message/event.
examples: button click, link click, clipboard copy

description: Navigate to a specific destination (tab/page/step/breadcrumb).
examples: go to page 5, switch to 'Settings' tab

description: Expand/collapse disclosure to target state.
Open/close overlay (dialog/drawer/popover/tooltip) to target state.
Respond to confirm/alert dialog.
Set boolean/tri-state to requested value.
Enter exact string and commit (blur/enter).
Enter structured value as text; must parse/validate.
Select exactly one option from a set (visible or listbox).
Select multiple options (k-of-n).
Open a popup/panel then select within it.
Type to filter/search options then select.
Set scalar numeric/continuous value within tolerance.
Set a pair of values within tolerance.
Match a reference state within tolerance.
examples: match color swatch, make two sliders equal

description: Clear/reset component state.
Select by traversing hierarchy (tree/cascader path).
Operate on a table/grid (sort/filter/paginate/select/edit).
examples: sort by Price desc, edit cell

description: Upload/select a file; validate file presence/metadata.
Remove/replace/reorder files in file list.
Drag to reorder/move/resize; validate resulting order/size.
Edit rich/code/markdown/json editor content.
Scroll/virtualize until a target is visible, then interact.
Move item(s) between containers (dual list / between columns).
